scope_note: Curated vendor list for productivity, AI services, and DIB security operations tools in the cmmc-advisor corpus. Authorization fields marked marketplace_live are refreshed from the official FedRAMP Marketplace export; DoD IL, CUI suitability, and practitioner notes remain corpus guidance and must still be verified before SSP citation.

vendors.cui_suitability: Limited CUI scenarios with agency agreement
vendors.notes: For typical DFARS 7012 CUI, GCC High is the contractor path.

vendors.product: Microsoft 365 Government Community Cloud High (GCC High)
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012; sovereign tenancy
vendors.notes: Common DIB contractor path. Physically and logically separated from commercial M365.

vendors.product: Google Workspace Enterprise Plus with Assured Controls Plus
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012 with Assured Controls Plus overlay
vendors.notes: Overlay model (not sovereign tenancy). IL5 is roadmap; use M365 GCC High for IL5 productivity workloads.

vendors.product: Atlassian Government Cloud (Jira, Jira Service Management, Confluence)
vendors.cui_suitability: CUI scenarios with agency agreement (FedRAMP Moderate ceiling)
vendors.notes: Bitbucket Cloud is NOT in scope (per Atlassian trust page). High/IL5 claims on vendor roadmap are not current authorization.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012
vendors.notes: Widely mis-cited as FedRAMP Moderate; verify current impact level on Marketplace before SSP citation.

vendors.cui_suitability: Source-code-only low-risk SaaS; not a general CUI file store
vendors.notes: Tailored/LI-SaaS scopes around source code as low-risk data. CUI in issues, PR bodies, and attachments sits outside Tailored design intent.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI file collaboration under DFARS 7012
vendors.notes: DoD IL framing on vendor pages is indirect; verify Marketplace package scope before SSP citation.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012; model-availability subset per AWS GovCloud documentation
vendors.notes: Bedrock is not a standalone Marketplace package; authorization inherits from AWS GovCloud. Verify per-model GovCloud availability in AWS docs before SSP citation.

vendors.product: Azure OpenAI Service in Azure Government
dod_impact_level: IL6 (Top Secret, out of CMMC L2 scope)
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012; IL6 out of CMMC L2 scope
vendors.notes: Azure OpenAI is not a standalone Marketplace package; authorization inherits from Azure Government. Verify per-model availability in Azure Government docs.

vendors.product: Vertex AI via Google Cloud Assured Workloads (FedRAMP High configuration)
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012 at IL2; IL5 is roadmap
vendors.notes: Vertex AI is not a standalone Marketplace package; platform boundary inherits from Google Cloud Platform. Verify per-model Assured Workloads availability before SSP citation.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI endpoints when package scope covers the enclave
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class D (High). Separate Moderate package exists; verify which package is under contract.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI endpoints when Falcon Gov package scope matches deployment
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class D (High). crowdstrike-hosts collector maps to SI family.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for vulnerability management on CUI systems
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). Tenable.io / Tenable.sc features must match package boundary.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for MFA on CUI-access paths
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). duo-auth-logs collector; prefer Entra logs when Duo is EAM.

vendors.product: Palo Alto Networks Government Cloud Services
vendors.cui_suitability: Moderate-impact SASE/XDR/cloud security services in package scope
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). Cortex/Prisma modules vary; on-prem PAN-OS is not this package.

vendors.cui_suitability: High-impact cloud security services in package scope
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class D (High). Confirm Prisma Access / Cortex SKUs against CRM.

vendors.cui_suitability: Data access governance for CUI in authorized repositories
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). Maps to AC/MP practices for file and entitlement monitoring.

vendors.cui_suitability: Observability for CUI workloads when logs/metrics stay in Gov boundary
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). High package (FR2023864279A) was In Process at last export.

vendors.product: AvePoint Online Services for US Government (AOS-UG)
vendors.cui_suitability: M365/SharePoint governance and backup for CUI tenancies
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). High tier package in process at last export.

vendors.cui_suitability: Network/SaaS path observability; not a SIEM substitute
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). Supports SC/AU partial evidence for path monitoring.

vendors.cui_suitability: Identity and MFA services in package scope
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class C (Moderate). RSA Archer GRC is not this package; search Marketplace separately.

vendors.product: Splunk Cloud Platform for FedRAMP High
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for high-impact CUI logging and correlation
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class D (High). Moderate package F1607197917 also available.

vendors.cui_suitability: Secure web gateway for CUI user traffic
vendors.notes: Rev5 Class D (High). zscaler-policy collector for policy posture.

vendors.cui_suitability: Contract/financial CUI in GovCon ERP when Authorized
vendors.notes: Status was FRR (not Authorized) at last Marketplace export. Verify before SSP citation.

vendors.cui_suitability: CMMC program workflow platform; not assessment evidence by itself
vendors.notes: FedRAMP In Process at last export. Not cite-safe until Authorized.
